experiment: H_PRIMITIVITY — Is d1/d2/d3 More Primitive Than Mathematical Formalization?
description: Meta-science test of H_PRIMITIVITY. 15 IRDME-tested scientific domains as nodes. Three layers: d1=formal_dependency (which domains require each other's math tools), d2=structural_grammar_type (which domains share the same d1/d2/d3 coupling class), d3=law_confirmation_coupling (which domains confirmed FPL with similar r-value ranges). H_PRIMITIVITY predicts: FPL holds at the meta-science level (r(d1↔d2) > r(d1↔d3)) AND formal mathematical structure predicts structural coupling class (d2) better than it predicts law confirmation outcome (d3). If CONFIRMED: the d1/d2/d3 grammar is more primitive than domain-specific mathematics — it organizes scientific domains independently of their formalization level.

hypotheses.statement: FPL holds at the meta-science level: r(formal_dependency ↔ structural_grammar_type) > r(formal_dependency ↔ law_confirmation_coupling). Domains that share mathematical tool dependencies (d1) are structurally similar in their coupling grammar (d2) more than they are similar in their FPL confirmation outcome (d3). Interpretation: mathematical formalization hierarchy organizes coupling types, but NOT law confirmation — the law is independent of formalization level.

Top hub in law_confirmation_coupling is molecular_biology or software_engineering — NOT formal_mathematics. Despite formal_mathematics being the #1 hub in formal_dependency (most depended-upon domain), it is NOT the strongest confirmer of the FPL. This shows law confirmation strength is driven by tight structural coupling (biology, software) not by mathematical formalization level.

Top hub in formal_dependency is formal_mathematics — confirming formal_mathematics is the most methodologically foundational domain. This validates the d1 layer encodes mathematical hierarchy correctly, making the h1 comparison meaningful.

r(formal_dependency ↔ law_confirmation_coupling) is NOT significant (p > 0.05) — mathematical formalization level does not significantly predict FPL confirmation strength. This is the direct test of H_PRIMITIVITY: the law's applicability is orthogonal to the mathematical formalization hierarchy.

notes: H_PRIMITIVITY meta-science experiment. d1/d2/d3 grammar predicts structural class (coupling type) better than it predicts law confirmation. If confirmed: d1/d2/d3 is a pre-mathematical primitive — the law holds across all levels of the mathematical formalization hierarchy without being explained by it. The 3 DENIED domains (finance, psychiatry, math_attr) form a triangle in law_confirmation_coupling despite having DIFFERENT formal_dependency levels — showing denials cluster by structural failure mode (resolution mismatch), not by mathematical formalization.
